faq.title: What you need to know to take the leap
faq.subtitle: Have another question? Please contact our team.

items.question: What is GDOM?
items.answer: GDOM (Goal-Driven Operations Manager) is a strategic engine and enterprise facade designed to turn your business vision into operational reality. Unlike a simple data server, it acts as an intelligent “black box” that orchestrates your goals, resources, and activities, letting you focus on the “what” of your strategy while the platform automatically manages the “how” securely and at scale.

items.question: How does GDOM protect my business?
items.answer:
The platform implements a Zero Trust Security model (“never trust, always verify”) with bank-grade shielding.

Invisible Sessions: access tokens are never stored in the browser, making the system immune to common XSS attacks.
Shielded Communications: internal traffic uses high-security mutual certificates (mTLS, RSA 4096 bits).
Data Encryption: credentials protected with AES-256-GCM at rest.
Total Isolation: business logic stays shielded behind a facade, with no direct internet exposure.

items.question: Is it suitable for small businesses?
items.answer: Yes. GDOM offers a Starter (Free) plan designed for organizations just getting started to visualize their basic goals and try the system at no cost. Its architecture is natively scalable, allowing the tool to grow with your company—from basic widgets to a full web application or even a model where you offer technology to your own clients.

items.question: What kind of systems can it integrate?
items.answer:
GDOM is a highly flexible domain-agnostic engine. Essentially, it can connect with anything that offers REST communication.

Legacy Systems: modernizes old accounting or management infrastructures.
Enterprise Platforms: integrates with existing ERPs and CRMs.
Cloud Services: compatible with any cloud API (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) that exposes REST endpoints or uses standard authentication (Bearer, API Key, OAuth).
High-Performance Technology*: uses protocols like gRPC to handle large data volumes and real-time streaming with external microservice systems.

We support 5 distinct authentication strategies (Bearer, Basic, API Key, OAuth, and Devise Token Auth) to adapt to any system without friction.

*Available in select plans. For more information, contact us.

items.question: Can I integrate GDOM with my existing system?
items.answer:
Without a doubt. GDOM works as a strategic facade that elevates the maturity level of your infrastructure. Instead of rebuilding from scratch, we overlay an architecture based on the HATEOAS standard, enabling dynamic orchestration of actions and menus based on each user's context.

The best part is the model's flexibility: you can enrich your current applications with these advanced capabilities through our various integration modalities or, if you prefer, we can deliver the complete application ready to operate. In any scenario, the essential features and logic of your original system remain intact, now powered by a flexible interface, absolute traceability, and Zero Trust shielding.
